creator: ats@first.gmd.de
text:
Fetching in ports/audio/easytag from the mastersite gives a checksum
error. It looks like the tar file has been repackaged after the
generation of the distinfo file.

Fix: 

Generating a new checksum and putting it into CVS ? Seems to build
ok.
How-To-Repeat: Do a make fetch and a make checksum.
